## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (500+ tests)
- [ ] Conventional commit format in PR title (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or API keys
- [ ] If touching `dist/` — agent specs, resource files, or SKILL.md updated
- [ ] If touching `bin/pixelslop-tools.cjs` — corresponding tests added/updated
- [ ] If adding a slop pattern — detection snippet included, severity band consistent with `scoring.md`
